For You

Ginseng Chicken Hot Pot.

Ginseng is an anti-ageing and energy boosting ingredient which helps to boost the immune system. Paired with fresh quarter chicken, chestnut and glutinous rice which has been double boiled up to 5 hours till perfection.

23.10

Chicken Bulgogi Bibimbap

The Bibimbap is the all time comfort food! Drizzle in our own made Hot Bean Paste (Gochuchang) or go mild without it. Comes with white rice topped with chicken bulgogi, kimchi pickle, pea shoots (dou miao), bean sprout and egg yolk. Toss them up to enjoy a hearty meal.

15.50

Chicken Army Stew
